basic_details.job_title: MeECL Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Meghalaya Energy Corporation Limited (MeECL) has released the official Assistant Engineer Notification 2026 on 22 April 2026 at meecl.nic.in. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced under the MeECL Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged as per State Government criteria (with 5 years relaxation for ST/SC) with a qualification of BE/BTech in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Engineering or Computer Science & IT Engineering can apply offline from 22 April 2026 to 15 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.age_details: As per State Government criteria, relaxable by 5 years for ST/SC candidates.
age_limit.details: The age limit is as per State Government criteria. Age relaxation of 5 years is applicable for ST/SC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/BTech in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Engineering or Computer Science & IT Engineering
qualification.details: Assistant Engineer (Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Engineering): BE/BTech (Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Engineering) from any Indian University/Institute recognised by the Government of Meghalaya or UGC or AICTE. Assistant Engineer (Computer Science & IT Engineering): BE/BTech (Computer Science & IT Engineering) from any Indian University/Institute recognised by the Government of Meghalaya or UGC or AICTE.

salary_details.details: Rs. 83,000/- to Rs. 196100/- plus usual allowances

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MeECL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.meecl.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MeECL Assistant Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the MeECL Assistant Engineer recruitment is 15 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/BTech degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Engineering or Computer Science & IT Engineering from a recognized Indian University or Institute to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Engineers in MeECL?
faq.answer: MeECL is recruiting for a total of 13 Assistant Engineer posts. These vacancies are distributed across Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Engineering and Computer Science/IT Engineering disciplines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for MeECL Assistant Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 800/- for General category candidates and Rs. 400/- for ST/SC category candidates. This fee needs to be submitted along with the application form.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Engineer post will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 83,000/- to Rs. 196100/- per month, along with usual allowances as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MeECL Assistant Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Engineer posts will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the final selection.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for reserved categories. Candidates belonging to ST/SC categories will receive an age relaxation of 5 years over and above the maximum age limit prescribed by the State Government.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the MeECL Assistant Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official MeECL website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and submit it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for MeECL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the MeECL website. A direct link to the notification is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of recruitment articles.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Assistant Engineer positions?
faq.answer: The Assistant Engineer positions at MeECL are full-time employment opportunities. This means that the selected candidates will be engaged in full-time service with the corporation.
